div.h2: Node.js libuv Event Loop ↔ This Project's Reactor
div.p: uv_run() is structurally identical to reactor_run_once()

g.text: Runs AFTER deferred tasks per tick
Returns array of ready fd events
New reactor_defer() in cb → next tick
Not part of uv_run() phase array
Phase order: libuv runs timers FIRST; reactor runs timers LAST
Both use epoll_wait(timeout_ms) as the blocking primitive
